subtitles.original_text: 今天天气非常好,我们来测试一下实时翻译系统的效果。
subtitles.translated_text: The weather is very good today, let's test the effect of the real-time translation system.

subtitles.original_text: 人工智能技术发展迅速,给生活带来了很多便利。
subtitles.translated_text: The rapid development of AI technology has brought a lot of convenience to life.
